name: Refrigerant Charge Calculator
seo_description: Calculate refrigerant charge for split and multi-split systems by line length, capacity and gas type. Free tool with instant kg results.

range_hints.longitud_linea_m: Pipe length between indoor and outdoor unit. Pre-charged: 3-5 m, Standard: 5-15 m, Long: 15-50 m
range_hints.potencia_eq_kw: Unit cooling capacity. Residential: 2-5 kW, Light commercial: 5-15 kW

result_context: Carga base: {carga_base_kg} kg. Carga extra per línea: {carga_extra_kg} kg. Carga total: {carga_total_kg} kg.
formula_display: Carga_total = Base(0.04 kg/kW × P) + Extra((L-5) × factor). R32: 0.02 kg/m, R410A: 0.025 kg/m
steps: Calculate carga base: 3.5 kW × 0.04 kg/kW = 0.140 kg
Calculate tramo with carga extra: 10 m - 5 m = 5 m
Calculate carga additional R32: 5 m × 0.02 kg/m = 0.100 kg
Verify subenfriamiento (8-12 K) and recalentamiento (5-8 K) tras the carga
mistakes: Load without hacer vacío previo — the humedad forms ácidos that dañan the compresor
Exceso of carga — reduces efficiency and can dañar the compresor per golpe of net amount
Not verifying subenfriamiento and recalentamiento — are the indicador is current is of carga correct
